query:
INSERT INTO diagnostic_schedules (name, cron_expression, enabled, categories, notify_on_failure, notify_on_warning)
VALUES 
  ('Daily Health Check', '0 0 6 * * *', TRUE, '["database", "entity", "token", "compliance"]', TRUE, FALSE),
  ('Hourly API Check', '0 0 * * * *', TRUE, '["api", "performance"]', TRUE, FALSE),
  ('Weekly Security Audit', '0 0 0 * * 0', TRUE, '["security", "integration"]', TRUE, TRUE);
